creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Merry Christmas and Happy New Year. :D

We are running a php setup with huge hits using nginx and php_fpm. We have tried these ports with that setup even before committing and never seen anything like these. So cannot confirm with apache. 

I am closing this for now. But if you have any additional information or changes that might help you let me know and reopen this ticket.
